scripts.lint: pnpm -w exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -w exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build: pnpm -w exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm -w exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: pnpm -w exec prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
